name: Jacksonville Credit Repair - Fix My Credit Scores
description_short: Jacksonville Credit Repair offers credit dispute resolution, report analysis, and score improvement strategies through licensed professionals serving the Jacksonville, FL area.
description_long:
Jacksonville Credit Repair - Fix My Credit Scores is a local credit repair service operating from 6110 Powers Ave in Jacksonville, Florida. The company positions itself as a licensed and insured provider of credit restoration services, claiming certified professionals on staff dedicated to helping consumers improve their financial standing.

The company offers four core service areas: Credit Report Analysis (identifying inaccurate or negative items), Dispute Resolution (challenging errors with credit bureaus), Score Improvement Plans (step-by-step strategies to build credit), and Debt & Credit Coaching (guidance for financial profile rebuilding). They emphasize same-day service availability and claim 24/7 accessibility. Their website states they work to remove errors, dispute negative items, and boost credit scores to help consumers qualify for better rates and loan opportunities.

The company differentiates itself through claims of being "5 Star Rated" (directing consumers to check Google, Facebook, Yelp, and BBB), offering same-day service, and promising "workmanship guaranteed" with "fast & friendly service by licensed professionals." They position their value proposition around speed, licensing, and results-oriented dispute strategies.

Key limitations exist in the profile. The website lacks specific details about pricing, typical timeline for results, success rates, or detailed information about their professional credentials. No information is provided about complaint history, licensing verification details, or specific case examples. The "5 Star Rated" claim is unverified on the profile itself. Like many credit repair firms, the company operates in a regulated space where outcomes depend heavily on the validity of disputes and bureau responsiveness, which the company cannot control.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Claims licensed and insured professionals (stated on website)
Provides multiple complementary services (analysis, disputes, coaching, planning) in one firm
Located at physical address in Jacksonville with phone and email contact
Emphasizes dispute resolution as core service, which is legally legitimate
Offers free initial credit report analysis and consultation
Website includes appointment booking functionality for client convenience
cons: No pricing information disclosed on website, making cost comparison impossible
No verified reviews, success rates, or specific case examples provided
Website claims "5 Star Rated" but provides no direct evidence or links to verification
Lacks detailed information about specific credentials, certifications, or licensing details
No information about typical timelines, dispute success rates, or realistic expectations
Generic marketing language without substantive detail about service differentiation
best_for: Jacksonville-area residents with inaccurate negative items on credit reports seeking local in-person service
Consumers who have been denied credit and want professional dispute assistance
Individuals seeking guidance on credit strategy alongside dispute services
diagnosis: Jacksonville Credit Repair is appropriate for local Jacksonville consumers seeking professional dispute services to address verifiable errors on their credit reports. The primary caveat is that credit repair services cannot remove accurate negative information, and success depends entirely on whether disputed items are actually inaccurate—consumers should verify the company's legitimacy and understand that no credit repair firm can guarantee score improvements if negative items are accurate and within reporting timeframes.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
meta_description: Jacksonville Credit Repair offers credit dispute resolution, report analysis, and score improvement strategies.
